config.cma_es: (mu/mu_w, lambda)-ES, lambda=16, mu=8, log-rank weights, sigma 0.9 * 0.93^gen floored at 0.12, continuous [0,3]^8 rounded; duplicates count against budget
config.features: 8 weekly counts (scalar, /3) + kappa + retained_prior + initial_regime_is_PC -> 11 dims (scalar counts chosen over one-hot; documented)
config.gp_bo: sklearn GP (Matern 2.5 + white), EI over 2048 random unevaluated candidates, init 32, batch q=budget//32, GP fit data capped at 512 points (256 best + 256 recent)
config.guided: fit on budget/2 random, verify top budget/4 predicted, refit once, verify top budget/4 again; KAN-guided omitted (wall-clock; documented deviation)
config.kan: pykan width [d_in,10,8,1], grid 5, k 3, LBFGS 60 steps, lr 0.01, train subsampled to <= 2048 rows (documented deviation for wall clock; mission allows <= 8192)
config.label: early_ret_complete_cohort
config.mlp: [64,64] ReLU, Adam lr 1e-3, MSE, full batch, early stop patience 60 on 20% val split of train, max 600 epochs
config.ridge: alpha=1.0 on standardized features, unpenalized intercept

d2_dispatch_replication.argmax_protocol: per profile: 5 replicates x n=30 sampled rows (seeded), predict all 43 arms, regret vs the 12-seed arm-mean of the best arm
d2_dispatch_replication.features_global: calm_mult, active_mult, mode one-hot (3), profile one-hot (6); seed excluded
d2_dispatch_replication.label: ret_excel

deviations_from_preregistration: KAN train sets subsampled to <= 2048 rows (mission allowed <= 8192; chosen smaller to fit the 2-3h wall-clock cap across ~270 KAN fits); global transfer KAN uses 8192.
Endpoint 3 surrogate-guided uses MLP-guided and ridge-guided only; KAN-guided omitted for wall-clock cost.
GP-BO fits on at most 512 of the evaluated points and proposes in batches (q=budget//32) — exact GP at n=4096 is computationally infeasible; budgets remain matched (every lookup counted).
